scripts.test: node tests/smoke.mjs && node tests/night-auto-close.mjs && node tests/dashboard-summary.mjs && node tests/location-service.mjs && node tests/fleet-map.mjs && node tests/i18n-labels.mjs
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:sync && cd "APP ANDROID/android" && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
